summary: Completed frontend UI testing for homepage reorganization with new section order and YouTube 'Dernières vidéos' section. All requested features are working correctly. Sections appear in the correct order: À la une → Prochains événements → Derniers articles → Dernières vidéos → Revues Conscience Soufie → Thematic sections. YouTube section has 3 video cards with red play buttons (rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.9)). Tab navigation working correctly.

minor.issue: Some 404 errors for magazine cover resources (see console logs)

action_items: MINOR: Fix duplicate React keys warning for 'hallaj' and 'ibn-arabi' in THEMATIC_TAGS array (accueil.tsx lines 35 and 37) - these tags redirect to same category causing key conflicts
critical_code_review_comments: THEMATIC_TAGS array has duplicate slugs (hallaj, ibn-arabi) with redirect:true causing React key warnings - consider using unique identifiers
YouTube videos are hardcoded in YOUTUBE_VIDEOS array (lines 47-66) - acceptable for MVP but could be fetched from YouTube API in future
Magazine cover images have some 404s - PDF file incorrectly used as image source (line 79)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage reorganization complete. Section order verified: 1) À la une, 2) Prochains événements, 3) Derniers articles, 4) Dernières vidéos (YouTube), 5) Revues Conscience Soufie, then thematic sections. YouTube section has 3 cards with red play buttons linking to @ConscienceSoufie channel. All 5 tabs working. Minor console warnings for duplicate React keys.

features_tested.section_a_la_une: PASS - Featured event displayed first with hero image
features_tested.section_prochains_evenements: PASS - Events carousel after À la une with 'Voir tout' link
features_tested.section_derniers_articles: PASS - Articles carousel after events with 'Voir tout' link
features_tested.section_dernieres_videos_youtube: PASS - 3 YouTube cards with red play buttons (rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.9), 40x40px), 'Voir la chaîne' link
features_tested.section_revues_conscience_soufie: PASS - Magazine carousel after YouTube section
features_tested.thematic_sections: PASS - All thematic sections present (Bibliographie, Le Prophète Muhammad, Ibn Arabî, Rûmî, Hallâj, Poésie, Hommages, etc.)
features_tested.section_order_verification: PASS - Positions verified: À la une(4), Prochains événements(82), Derniers articles(448), Dernières vidéos(891), Revues(975)
features_tested.tab_navigation: PASS - All 5 tabs (Accueil, Articles, Podcasts, Zoom, À Propos) navigate correctly

console_warnings: Duplicate React key 'hallaj' - THEMATIC_TAGS has same slug twice
Duplicate React key 'ibn-arabi' - THEMATIC_TAGS has same slug twice
Some 404 errors for magazine cover resources
